heading: Thursday Night
text: A few early clouds, mainly northeast, otherwise clearing. Areas of valley fog late. Lows from the mid 40s to lower 50s, some mid 50s in the Champlain Valley, and some lower 40s in northern cold hollows. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Friday
text: Areas of valley fog early, then mostly sunny. Highs in the upper 70s to lower 80s, some mid 70s northeast and in the Adirondacks. South to southwest at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Mostly clear. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, some upper 50s in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Winds becoming light, variable to southeast.
